record_types.name: AUnit_Options

documentation.description: Options used to determine how a test should be run.

constants.name: Default_Options
constants.code:
Default_Options : constant AUnit_Options :=
  (Global_Timer     => False,
   Test_Case_Timer  => False,
   Report_Successes => True,
   Filter           => null);
